summary: Iteration 11 - Tax Planning & Portfolio Rebalancing Features Testing. Backend APIs 100% PASS (18/18 tests). Frontend all sections verified. Tax Planning shows FY 2025-26, tax saved estimates, 80C (₹10K/₹1.5L, 7%) with PPF items, 80D (₹0/₹25K). Rebalancing shows Balanced Growth/Moderate strategy, actual vs target allocation bars, 4 action items (Reduce Equity 49.9%, Increase Debt/Alt/Gold).
critical_code_review_comments: Tax summary endpoint correctly maps PPF transactions to Section 80C
Portfolio rebalancing uses saved Moderate risk profile for target allocations
Rebalancing actions only show when diff >= 2% (good threshold logic)
All data-testid attributes present for key elements (tax-section-80C, tax-section-80D, rebalance-card)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Tax Planning & Rebalancing features verified

seed_data_creation: Used existing PPF transactions (2x ₹5,000) for tax 80C testing. Risk profile already set to Moderate.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tax Planning and Portfolio Rebalancing features fully tested. Tax API returns sections array with 80C/80D with used/limit/percentage/items. Rebalancing API returns profile, strategy_name, actual/target allocations, and actions array with reduce/increase suggestions. Frontend displays both sections after Risk Profile & Strategy section. All 8 Invest screen sections render correctly: Markets, Portfolio Overview, My Holdings, Asset Allocation, Risk Profile, Tax Planning, Rebalancing Actions, Financial Goals.

Backend.GET /api/tax-summary: PASS - Returns sections (80C, 80D), fy, tax_saved estimates
Backend.Tax 80C structure: PASS - limit=150000, used=10000, percentage=6.7, items=[PPF x2]
Backend.GET /api/portfolio-rebalancing: PASS - Returns profile, strategy_name, actual, target, actions
Backend.Rebalancing profile: PASS - Returns Moderate (from saved risk profile)
Backend.Rebalancing strategy: PASS - Returns 'Balanced Growth' for Moderate profile
Backend.Rebalancing actions: PASS - 4 actions with correct reduce/increase suggestions

Frontend.Section 80C items: PASS - Two PPF items at ₹5,000 each
Frontend.Rebalancing bars: PASS - 4 bars for Equity/Debt/Gold/Alt with actual vs target
Frontend.Other sections intact: PASS - Markets, Portfolio, Holdings, Risk Profile, Goals all render

screenshots_captured: 09_rebalancing.png - Rebalancing Actions with actual vs target bars and 4 action items
